content.en:
Before you know it, a thousand extradimensional epochs have passed.

During this period, no Fourth Realm has ever been here.

After all, there are very few fourth realms that enter the Heavenly Spider Battlefield, not to mention that the Heavenly Spider Battlefield is very large, and the other Fourth Realms don't dare to run around casually, and the probability of Ye Tian being discovered is very low.

"Almost!"

Ye Tian smiled.

After a thousand extradimensional epochs, he finally created two four-realm multi-dimensional masteries.

A four-realm multi-dimensional mastery is the seal of fire robbery, and a four-realm multi-dimensional mastery is the blade of thunder.

Since the creation of these two Four Realms Multi-Dimensional Peerless Learning, Ye Tian no longer hesitated, and immediately approached the wooden knife.

Rumble!!!!

The power of the fire burst out and swept through the sky.

Ye Tian used to cast the seal of fire robbery, and a seal appeared around him, forming a fire seal, directly resisting the power of fire robbery. "Twenty-five-zero" immediately followed, and the power of the thunderstorm roared.

Ye Tian immediately cast the Thunder Raid Blade, and a thunder knife appeared, slashing at the falling Thunderbolt, directly directing the power of the Thunderbolt away.

In this way, Ye Tian passed through many obstacles and came to the vicinity of the wooden knife.

"Give it to me!"

Ye Tian grabbed the wooden knife with one hand, and the terrifying fire robbery and thunder robbery broke out.

But Ye Tian relied on the two four realms and multi-dimensional mastery to kill from it.

However, he was still severely injured, his body was almost scrapped, and the extradimensional realm in his body had been shattered.

It can be said that this replica body is useless, but he also successfully brought out the Three Tribulations Innate Multidimensional Supreme Treasure Wood Knife.

"Let's go!"

Ye Tian first sealed this Three Tribulations Innate Multi-Dimensional Supreme Treasure with the Great Realm Armor Technique, and then escaped.

Immediately.

He left the Spider Battlefield as fast as he could.

Otherwise, it would not be good for that Fifth Realm to react and send a large number of Fourth Realms to search for or target every Fourth Realm that entered the Heavenly Spider Battlefield.

So, it's better to open it first.

Soon.

Ye Tian left the Heavenly Spider Battlefield, and even left the Four Thousand Territory as fast as possible.

I have to say that Ye Tian's decision was very correct.

Territory of the Four Thousand.

The headquarters of the Supreme Youth Sect.

Inside a palace.

The powerhouse of the super-dimensional realm who was at the peak of the fifth realm, the Luo Qing Realm Lord, opened his eyes.

He found that his arrangement in the Heavenly Spider Battlefield had been destroyed, and now he couldn't even perceive the Three Tribulations Innate Multidimensional Treasure.

"Who???

The Luo Qing Realm Lord was furious.

As the existence of the pinnacle of the Fifth Realm, his status is so high, although he is not the most powerful batch of Fifth Realms, but except for those Fifth Realms who have retreated and cultivated many multi-dimensional tribulations, and have hardly been born, he is the top.

But now, there are extradimensional realms that dare to destroy his arrangement.

"That's my Three Tribulations Innate Multidimensional Treasure, if it is a few hundred million extradimensional eras, it will definitely be able to advance to the Four Tribulations Innate Multidimensional Treasure!"

At the same time that the Lord of Luo Qing Realm was angry, he was also heartbroken to death.

If there is a Four Tribulations Innate Multidimensional Treasure, his combat power will inevitably increase greatly.

The point is, that Four Tribulations Innate Multi-Dimensional Treasure is not simple, it can not only increase combat power, but also has a special effect, which is far from being comparable to ordinary innate multi-dimensional Treasures.

Immediately, he sent a large number of Fourth Realms to block the various territories corresponding to the Heavenly Spider Battlefield, and even sent the Fourth Realm of the Fifth Heavenly Pass Combat Power and even the Sixth Day Pass Combat Force to enter the Heavenly Spider Battlefield to search for clues.

Of course.

The Luo Qing Realm Lord also deduced the other party's traces by himself, but he couldn't deduce anything.

"Damn, there must be other Fifth Realm plans behind it, who did it?"

......

Luo Qing Realm Lord's actions attracted the attention of many forces, but they didn't know who had taken Luo Qing Realm Lord's Three Tribulations Innate Multidimensional Treasure.

And it stands to reason that the Fourth Realm should not be able to take away that Three Tribulations Innate Multidimensional Treasure, how did the other party do it?

Territory of four thousand five hundred.

Ye Tian came back, and he breathed a sigh of relief at this time.

Of course.

He did this not without a little flaw, the Extinction Realm Lord should be able to guess it, but the Extermination Realm Lord should not say it, and it will not be beneficial to the Extermination Realm Lord to say it.

Other than that.

There is no evidence for the Lord of the Extinction Realm.

Afterwards.

Ye Tian sent another copy body to take away this Three Tribulations Innate Multidimensional Supreme Treasure and bring it back to the Five Thousand Territory, so that the more away from that Luo Qing Realm Lord, the chance of being found was even lower.

Some more years passed, and this matter gradually became less of a force's attention, and the Luo Qing Realm Lord also knew that he could not recapture the Three Tribulations Innate Multidimensional Treasure, so he summoned those Fourth Realms and no longer pursued them.......

However, the Luo Qing Realm Lord still issued a task, if anyone found the Three Tribulations Innate Multidimensional Treasure, or provided information, he would give a large reward.

......

As it turned out, the Lord of the Extinct Realm did not betray himself.

After all, the Extinction Realm Lord is not stupid, if he leaks it, and there is no evidence to say, the Luo Qing Realm Lord may not really reward the Extermination Realm Lord, and maybe he will kill him.

After all, in the eyes of the Fallen Qing Realm Lord, the Extinction Realm Lord may be one of the plotters, otherwise why would he know the truth?

And in the days that followed, Ye Tian went all out to polish the mark of the Luo Qing Realm Lord in the wooden knife, which took more time.

However, he was still studying the wooden knife while he was wearing out the mark.

"Firmament Blade!"

This was the name of this innate multi-dimensional treasure, and Ye Tian actually sensed the power of fire and thunder from it, and these two powers were fused with the assistance of the power of the Firmament Wood Blade.

However, without completely erasing the Luo Qing Realm Lord Mark, he couldn't use this Firmament Wood Blade.

Before you know it, more than 600 extradimensional epochs have passed.

this day.

Ye Tian finally wiped out the mark of the Luo Qing Realm Lord, turning this Firmament Wooden Blade into an ownerless thing.

After that, he began refining this Firmament Wood Blade.

After a period of time, he successfully mastered the Firmament Blade, and finally knew the effect of the Firmament Blade.

"Transform the power of the multi-dimensional tribulation and make this 5.1 power mild!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

This ability seems to be very ordinary, but it is actually terrifying!

This meant that he could easily study the power of the Multidimensional Tribulation and create an extremely powerful multi-dimensional mastery.

The most important thing is that Ye Tian can use the Firmament Wood Blade to transform the power of fire and thunder to refine his soul will.

Over the years, he had also been exploring how to raise his soul will to the ninth dimension, which was almost impossible to achieve with ordinary refining methods.

But he also learned that the fastest way was to use the power of the multi-dimensional tribulation to refine the soul will, but the ordinary fourth realm did not dare to do this at all, otherwise the soul will would be shattered by the power of the multi-dimensional tribulation.

Even Ye Tian's self-created Wind Tribulation Will Method is just a wisp of power that uses the Wind Tribulation, and the effect is not good.
